title: Bridge Essay: Directional brain networks underlying OM chanting.

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Language/Mantra** (Phase 9) with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Links Language/Mantra to mechanistic neuroscience.

**Directional brain networks underlying OM chanting.** — Asian J Psychiatr. PMID: 30099280. DOI: 10.1016/j.ajp.2018.08.001. OM chanting is an ancient technique of Indian meditation. OM chanting is associated with an experience of relaxation, changes in autonomic balance and deactivation of limbic brain regions. While functional localization is important, how brain regions interact with each other has been shown to underlie various brain functions. Therefore, in this study, we tested the hypothesis that there is reduced communication between deactivated regions during OM chanting. In order to do so, we employed multiv
